source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Five identical measuring jugs are filled with water. Four of them contain exactly the same amount of water. Which measuring jug contains a different amount?
<image1>
extraction_notes: options field contains only labels without descriptive option text

image_dependency: question asks which measuring jug has a different water amount, which depends on visually inspecting the jugs
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the image is central to solving
answer options are only labels A-E, so the identifying information must come from the image rather than text alone
multi_step: solver likely must inspect all five jugs, compare their water levels, and identify the single outlier among four matching jugs
this involves more than one comparison, but the task is still a relatively simple visual outlier-detection problem rather than a long reasoning chain
multiple choice with 5 options constrains the task, keeping reasoning complexity moderate
verifiability: answer_type is option/choice and answer_text='B', so the final output format is precise and easy to check
registry_passed=true, answer_present=true, and image asset exists, supporting downstream verification
image_quality_summaries show good readability_score (0.8634), which should make visual checking feasible

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产齐全，registry_passed=true，且无已登记问题
该题强依赖图像，但图像文件存在且可用于恢复核心语义
verifiability_score较高，答案为明确选项，便于后续核验
无风险标记，综合来看具有较高收录价值
